problem-framing 1 open comment
OverviewEvidenceHypothesesDecisionsExperimentMeetingsReview
Audit

Decisions and revisions

Choices, rationale, dissent, and changes remain reviewable.

decision-001

Run a manually assisted status-response experiment

Owner

Director of Engineering

Rationale

The support hypothesis can be tested without committing to dashboard infrastructure.

Alternatives considered

  • Build the centralized dashboard
  • Train support to use existing deployment tools
  • Make no change

Unresolved dissent

  • Engineering leadership still wants portfolio reporting investigated separately.
